data.body:
PASS 1 review — [T10] Infrastructure / IaC (overlay): PASS (not-applicable).

This plan ships an LLM eval suite (Inspect-AI specs under `.rebar/evals/`, prompt-library edits in `src/rebar/llm/`, labeled eval cases/fixtures, CI test-gating). It provisions/configures no cloud resources or IaC (no Terraform/CloudFormation/CDK/Pulumi/Ansible/Kubernetes/Helm). "CI-gated" refers to test gating of prompt changes, not infra provisioning; the corpuses (DSO, snap-oakhart-manual, rebar tickets) are data sources and "DSO stays read-only" is a data-access constraint, not IaC state/locking. Per the T10 overlay's own ANTI-FP guidance, this is not-applicable for a non-infra ticket. No findings.
